---
title: "Impacto de la IA en los estudiantes"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    df_print: paged
author:
  - Luis-Felipe Guajardo Torres
  - Pablo Morales Carvallo
  - rancisco Bahamondes Castro
  - Gabriel Lafertte Cárcamo
  - Diego Meléndez Córdova
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  cols.print = 5,
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  ft.htmlscroll = TRUE
)

library(tidyverse)
library(visdat)
library(dlookr)
library(flextable)
library(skimr)
library(qqplotr)
library(ggpmisc)
library(VIM)
library(mice)
library(gridExtra)

set_flextable_defaults(
  font.size        = 10,
  padding          = 4,
  border.color     = "#cccccc",
  theme_fun        = theme_booktabs,
  digits           = 2,
  decimal.mark     = ",",
  big.mark         = ".",
  na_str           = "—",
)
```
